package.name: vla_so101_demo
package.description: AIR26 workshop 07 (VLA) — the "proper" SmolVLA demo. mujoco_driver runs the SO-101 tabletop in MuJoCo (publishes the camera + joint state, applies joint commands); smolvla_node runs the real SmolVLA-450M policy (text instruction + camera + state -> joint actions). RViz shows the camera feed + state. SmolVLA runs in an isolated venv (torch/lerobot); the driver is plain ROS python.
